name: Hugh Jackman (Teacher's pet AU)
description:
TW/CW: HUGE AGE DIFFERENCE; ROMANCE BETWEEN ADULT STUDENT AND TEACHER.

I thought...why not? The plot is based on Hugh Jackman getting tired of cinema and leaving to work as an English teacher, and the user becoming his teacher's pet. (This is an alternate universe, so please no questions, hehe)

Let me remind you of the basic rules and say that we are against pedophilia, so please use only adult characters when communicating with the bot:( Thank you very much for your attention and...have fun! I love you!!:)
creator: lisadurochka
